title: bd actions log
html:
BD Actions Log

Track recommendations generated, actions taken, and outcomes.

Format

[Date] — Agent Run

Recommendations received: [count] Actions taken:

  • [Action description] — [outcome if known]

2026-04-15 — OOO Catch-up Signals

Recommendations received: 2 (from email/chat scan)

Actions taken:

  • Astellas/Alex C staffing request — Utkarsh Srivastava forwarded Sara Farina's email to Rajat Nagpal, asking him to "discuss this 1-1" and "also run the request by Vinoth." CC: Rahul Fokane, Vinoth, Athirai, Ankit. → Wait for Rajat to raise. Review trailing Sara Farina email for context.
  • Advance.ai competitive threat (UCB) — Vipasha flagged Advance.ai during UCB meeting: "they seem to be gaining traction among many pharma companies" (GSK, AZ, Astellas, Novartis testimonials). UCB considered delaying ZoomRx zero-cost pilot. Rahul's guidance: "bring as much complexity, granularity and nuance as we can. That's where the generic models are failing." ZoomRx going "all in" with customizations + Sagan Answers add-on. → Review Advance.ai positioning. Relevant beyond UCB — may affect other accounts.

Log starts when BD Next Best Action agent goes live.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
